query: SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM hora) >= 7 AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM hora) < 12 THEN 'Desayuno' WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM hora) >= 12 AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM hora) < 18 THEN 'Comida' ELSE 'Cena' END as "turno!", COUNT(*)::BIGINT as "total!", COALESCE(SUM(num_personas), 0)::BIGINT as "personas!" FROM reservas WHERE user_id = $1 AND fecha >= $2 AND fecha <= $3 AND estado NOT IN ('cancelada') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
